name: freaky-iptv
description: Desktop IPTV player with programme guide, favourites and playback statistics.
author: Freaky IPTV

scripts.dev: npm run build:host && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.build:native:win: npm run clean:native && npm run build:dpapi-helper && npm run build:libvlc-proxy
scripts.build:native:mac:x64: npm run clean:native && npm run build:libvlc-proxy:mac:x64
scripts.build:native:mac:arm64: npm run clean:native && npm run build:libvlc-proxy:mac:arm64
scripts.build:dpapi-helper: dotnet publish dpapi-helper/dpapi-helper.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:IncludeNativeLibrariesForSelfExtract=true -p:DebugType=None -p:DebugSymbols=false -o native-runtime/win-x64/dpapi
scripts.build:win: npm run prepare:windows-icon && npm run build:native:win && node scripts/stage-native-runtime.cjs win-x64 && node scripts/prepare-ffmpeg.cjs win-x64 && npm run build:renderer
scripts.build:mac:x64: npm run prepare:macos-icon && npm run build:native:mac:x64 && node scripts/stage-native-runtime.cjs darwin-x64 && node scripts/prepare-ffmpeg.cjs darwin-x64 && npm run build:renderer
scripts.build:mac:arm64: npm run prepare:macos-icon && npm run build:native:mac:arm64 && node scripts/stage-native-runtime.cjs darwin-arm64 && node scripts/prepare-ffmpeg.cjs darwin-arm64 && npm run build:renderer
scripts.build:libvlc-proxy: dotnet publish libvlc-proxy-helper/LibVlcProxyHelper.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:DebugType=None -p:DebugSymbols=false -o native-runtime/win-x64/libvlc-proxy && node scripts/prune-libvlc-runtime.cjs
scripts.build:libvlc-proxy:mac:x64: dotnet publish libvlc-proxy-helper/LibVlcProxyHelper.csproj -c Release -r osx-x64 --self-contained true -p:DebugType=None -p:DebugSymbols=false -o native-runtime/darwin-x64/libvlc-proxy
scripts.build:libvlc-proxy:mac:arm64: dotnet publish libvlc-proxy-helper/LibVlcProxyHelper.csproj -c Release -r osx-arm64 --self-contained true -p:DebugType=None -p:DebugSymbols=false -o native-runtime/darwin-arm64/libvlc-proxy
scripts.package:win: npm run clean:release:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win && npm run verify:package:win
scripts.release:win: npm test && npm run lint && npm run clean:release:win && npm run build && playwright test && electron-builder --win && npm run verify:package:win
scripts.package:mac:x64: npm run build:mac:x64 && electron-builder --mac --x64 && npm run verify:package:mac -- x64
scripts.package:mac:arm64: npm run build:mac:arm64 && electron-builder --mac --arm64 && npm run verify:package:mac -- arm64
scripts.package:mac: npm run clean:release:mac && npm run package:mac:x64 && npm run package:mac:arm64
scripts.release:mac: npm test && npm run lint && npm run clean:release:mac && npm run build:mac:x64 && playwright test && electron-builder --mac --x64 && npm run verify:package:mac -- x64 && npm run build:mac:arm64 && electron-builder --mac --arm64 && npm run verify:package:mac -- arm64
